Community.Line1: Community is where it all begins—a place where, quite simply, people come together to have a good time. It doesn’t matter if you’re a gaming enthusiast or just looking for a chat after a long day: here, you’ll always find someone to share a moment with.
Community.Line2: We organize events, jump on calls to chat about the latest news, or hop into a quick tactical game to blow off some steam. It’s a living space, created to bridge the gap and turn a nickname into a friend. This is where our craziest virtual adventures begin, and where every new idea immediately finds someone ready to back it up.
Community.Line3:
The only one missing is you.
Come and be part of our story.

Home.Line1: Neo Galaxy was born from a simple idea: bringing people and their passions together under one digital roof.
Home.Line2: We aren't just a group of friends or a team of developers; we are a network where every piece fits together to give you exactly what you’re looking for. Whether you’re here to unwind after a long day of study or work, or you need a technical team to launch your next big idea, you’re in the right place.
Home.Line3: Our ecosystem thrives on the warmth of our Community, where we host events and gaming sessions, and the precision of our Software House, ready to turn your projects into real code.
